summary: Iteration 23 - Razorpay Payment Sync Feature Testing Complete. All backend tests passed (12/12). Frontend verification successful - Sync Payments button visible and functional, 17 synced orders displayed with customer details.
critical_code_review_comments: Feature implementation is solid - proper pagination handling for fetching Razorpay payments
Good idempotency - second sync correctly shows 0 new orders when all payments already exist
Customer details correctly extracted from Razorpay: name, phone (cleaned +91), email
Proper 'source: razorpay_sync' field added to distinguish synced orders
RZP- prefix on order numbers helps identify Razorpay-synced orders
Note: Some synced orders show 'Razorpay Customer' as name when customer details not available in Razorpay payment
seed_data_creation: No new seed data - tested with existing synced orders from live Razorpay account
context_for_next_testing_agent: Razorpay payment sync feature fully tested. Key endpoints: GET /api/admin/razorpay/payments (fetch from Razorpay), POST /api/admin/razorpay/sync (sync to orders), GET /api/admin/razorpay/payment/{id} (specific payment). 17 payments synced with RZP- prefix. Frontend has 'Sync Payments' button in Orders tab with data-testid='sync-razorpay-btn'. Shows success message with counts after sync.

backend_apis.GET /api/admin/razorpay/payments: PASSED - Returns captured payments with customer details
backend_apis.POST /api/admin/razorpay/sync: PASSED - Syncs payments to orders, idempotent
backend_apis.GET /api/shop/orders: PASSED - Returns all orders including synced ones

frontend_ui.Orders tab: PASSED - Shows orders with customer details
frontend_ui.Sync result message: PASSED - Shows '17 payments processed • 0 new orders • 0 updated'
frontend_ui.Synced badge: PASSED - 17 'Synced' badges visible on RZP- orders
frontend_ui.Customer details display: PASSED - Name, phone, email shown for each order

data_verification.customer_name: Present - extracted from Razorpay payment or fallback 'Razorpay Customer'
data_verification.customer_phone: Present when available in Razorpay (cleaned +91 prefix)
